settings.announcement_text: BUY 2 BOTTLES OF AMERICAN METAL WHISKEY = FREE SHIPPING!

custom_css: .announcement_text {font-family: SS Nickson five; font-size: 15px !important; letter-spacing: 2px; line-height: 16px;}
a {font-family: SS Nickson one; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 100px; letter-spacing: 3px; color: #f3edd9;}
.site-header,.overlay-header {background: linear-gradient( to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 1) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9) 20%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4) 80%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100% );}
